final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China roadshow fundraising deck announcing GPT-5.5, with Sam Altman as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a high-end China domestic GP/LP roadshow aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with clear title hierarchy and presenter credit
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch announcement as the central theme, Sam Altman as named presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative, institutional-grade atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that balances tech-forward and China domestic finance formality — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (large, primary headline), "演讲人：奥特曼" (presenter credit)
Constraints: must conform to China domestic roadshow / GP investor deck cover conventions — layout, hierarchy, and tone should feel native to 国内融资路演 context
Avoid: generic Western VC deck aesthetics; overly casual or consumer-app visual language
